Catalog/Cardiovascular/Dafodil Mitral Sizer Set
❤️ CardiovascularREF: DFM2331

Dafodil Mitral Sizer Set

Dafodil · Surgical Instruments

The Dafodil Mitral Sizer Set is a precision cardiovascular surgical instrument designed for accurate mitral valve prosthesis sizing during cardiac procedures. Compatible exclusively with Dafodil Mitral Bioprosthesis, this medical-grade sizer set offers comprehensive size range from 23mm to 31mm for optimal valve selection. Essential for cardiac surgeons performing mitral valve replacement surgeries, ensuring precise prosthetic valve fitting and improved patient outcomes. Manufactured with superior medical-grade materials for reliable sterile surgical use.

MaterialMedical grade materials
Frequently Asked Questions

The Dafodil Mitral Sizer Set is a precision cardiovascular surgical instrument designed for accurate mitral valve prosthesis sizing during cardiac procedures. Compatible exclusively with Dafodil Mitral Bioprosthesis, this medical-grade sizer set offers comprehensive size range from 23mm to 31mm for optimal valve selection. Essential for cardiac surgeons performing mitral valve replacement surgeries, ensuring precise prosthetic valve fitting and improved patient outcomes. Manufactured with superior medical-grade materials for reliable sterile surgical use.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Dafodil Mitral Sizer Set, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Dafodil Mitral Sizer Set is constructed using Medical grade materials, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
